calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Continued To Sep-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sarah Silbert, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Gerald Chipeur and Gerald D. Chipeur a Professional Corporation carrying on business as Chipeur Advocates.
No appearance by defendant Tim Twinam, carrying on business as PEEBS.NET.
Amended Default entered against defendant on July 3, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Gerald Chipeur and Gerald D. Chipeur a Professional Corporation carrying on business as Chipeur Advocates, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tim Twianm, carrying on business as PEEBS.NET as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,165.32.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,008.92.
Costs - $5,282.36, for a total of $59,456.60.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2008 Continued To Jul-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
